_comment: Canonical cross-language reading-key derivation vectors (maktub#304). The SINGLE source of truth every language port (TS @bytesbrains/maktub-sdk, Dart app) asserts against, byte-for-byte. A divergence permanently orphans a user's letters — Critical-class invariant. All hex is 0x-less. The `labels` are the HKDF domain separators that MUST match across ports (testing the derived outputs implicitly validates them).

localKey._note: canonical all-"abandon" BIP-39 mnemonic, empty passphrase → 64-byte seed → reading key

smartWallet._note: fixed 32-byte WebAuthn PRF output 0x00..0x1f → reading key

rawKey._note: raw-hex localKey: 32-byte private key (no seed) → reading key derived from the private key
